subcodes.first_line: O thou who bearest tribulations, afflictions and trials in the path of the Most Glorious Beauty—may my spirit and the spirits of those who have tasted [His sweetness be a sacrifice unto Him]... Days pass swiftly, and life without patience [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متحمل بلایا و مشقات و رزایا در سبیل جمال ابهی روحی لاحبائه الذین ذاقوا... ایام در گذر است و حیات بی تحمل
subcodes.subjects: @purpose; goal of creation, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
